decision_summary: Approve v7.7 as Adoption-Grade v7 Runtime with bounded structural/runtime adoption claim.
rationale: The release adds fresh-project v7 evidence generation and release-state audit coverage while preserving explicit not-proven boundaries.
target_audience: AOF operator and adopter project AI orchestrator
expected_user_reaction: A human can see that adoption proof means runtime evidence, not market adoption.
artifact_change_recommendations: Keep v7.8 focused on projecting this evidence into Mission Control.
